subsidyType: city-managed full replacement program at no cost under leak repair elevated test results and water main rehabilitation scheduling
publicSideCovered: yes the city replaces the public portion at no cost
privateSideCovered: yes full replacement is provided at no cost when city criteria are met
propertyRules: property must have a lead service line and either a disturbance elevated test result or later scheduled main rehabilitation
contractorRules: public utilities coordinates inspections testing replacement and post-replacement filter support
